title: 2026-03-04 TACO Pressure Index Update: Elevated at 29.50
description: Fresh macro pressure read for 2026-03-04: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 29.50/100, signaling a elevated pressure regime as volatility and front-end rate pressure shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2026-03-04, the score printed 29.50/100 in the elevated regime, with volatility and front-end rate pressure doing most of the work.
